raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"'Improve' on a research draft plausibly includes tightening logical flow — e.g., the causal chain from self-distillation training to benchmark gains needs to hold together; central but not yet confirmed load-bearing.","R1.3":"The draft makes specific quantitative claims (7.4/5.8/11.2 pt gains, 62% text-only rate, ablation attributions) that any improvement pass should verify are coherently presented relative to the evidence described; central expected responsibility.","R1.6":"'Improve this draft' most directly and universally maps to prose quality — clarity, concision, register, paragraph cohesion; treated as load-bearing because failure here would undermine any other improvement."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I limit improvements to surface-level prose quality (sentence clarity, word choice, paragraph flow), or do you also want substantive scientific feedback on argument structure and evidence-claim alignment?"}

rationale.R1.2: 'Improve' on a research draft plausibly includes tightening logical flow — e.g., the causal chain from self-distillation training to benchmark gains needs to hold together; central but not yet confirmed load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: The draft makes specific quantitative claims (7.4/5.8/11.2 pt gains, 62% text-only rate, ablation attributions) that any improvement pass should verify are coherently presented relative to the evidence described; central expected responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: 'Improve this draft' most directly and universally maps to prose quality — clarity, concision, register, paragraph cohesion; treated as load-bearing because failure here would undermine any other improvement.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I limit improvements to surface-level prose quality (sentence clarity, word choice, paragraph flow), or do you also want substantive scientific feedback on argument structure and evidence-claim alignment?
